name: perceptionlab
description: PerceptionLab product foundation, documentation, and local quality gates.

scripts.install:worker:ml: cd worker && UV_CACHE_DIR=../.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv sync --extra ml --group dev
scripts.install:deps: npm run bootstrap:env && npm run install:rust && npm run install:worker:ml
scripts.check:worker: cd worker && UV_CACHE_DIR=../.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv run pytest
scripts.quality: npm test && npm run validate:docs && npm run validate:openapi && npm run validate:bdd && npm run validate:conventions && npm run validate:p0-bootstrap && npm run validate:migrations && npm run check:rust && npm run check:worker && npm run lint:architecture
